chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D - 232 of 2023 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.5527/2023 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.1080/2023 (Ex.A) 4. For hearing of main case. 12.09.2023 Mr. Abdul Mujeeb Shaikh, Advocate for the Petitioner >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the petitioner on instructions does not press this petition. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI
